debug_info.goal:
case h_bounds_b
q : ProjectivePoint
h_qX_bounds : ∀ i < 5, ↑q.X[i]! ≤ 2 ^ 52
h_qY_bounds : ∀ i < 5, ↑q.Y[i]! ≤ 2 ^ 52
h_qZ_bounds : ∀ i < 5, ↑q.Z[i]! ≤ 2 ^ 52
XX : u64.field.FieldElement51
_✝⁶ : [> let XX ← q.X.square <]
XX_post : Field51_as_Nat XX ≡ Field51_as_Nat q.X ^ 2 [MOD p]
YY : u64.field.FieldElement51
_✝⁵ : [> let YY ← q.Y.square <]
YY_post : Field51_as_Nat YY ≡ Field51_as_Nat q.Y ^ 2 [MOD p]
ZZ2 : u64.field.FieldElement51
_✝⁴ : [> let ZZ2 ← q.Z.square2 <]
ZZ2_post : Field51_as_Nat ZZ2 % p = 2 * Field51_as_Nat q.Z ^ 2 % p
X_plus_Y : u64.field.FieldElement51
_✝³ : [> let X_plus_Y ← add q.X q.Y <]
X_plus_Y_post : ∀ i < 5, ↑X_plus_Y[i]! = ↑q.X[i]! + ↑q.Y[i]!
X_plus_Y_sq : u64.field.FieldElement51
_✝² : [> let X_plus_Y_sq ← X_plus_Y.square <]
X_plus_Y_sq_post : Field51_as_Nat X_plus_Y_sq ≡ Field51_as_Nat X_plus_Y ^ 2 [MOD p]
YY_plus_XX : u64.field.FieldElement51
_✝¹ : [> let YY_plus_XX ← add YY XX <]
YY_plus_XX_post : ∀ i < 5, ↑YY_plus_XX[i]! = ↑YY[i]! + ↑XX[i]!
YY_minus_XX : u64.field.FieldElement51
_✝ : [> let YY_minus_XX ← sub YY XX <]
YY_minus_XX_post : (Field51_as_Nat YY_minus_XX + Field51_as_Nat XX) % p = Field51_as_Nat YY % p
fe : u64.field.FieldElement51
_ : [> let fe ← sub X_plus_Y_sq YY_plus_XX <]
fe_post : (Field51_as_Nat fe + Field51_as_Nat YY_plus_XX) % p = Field51_as_Nat X_plus_Y_sq % p
⊢ ∀ i < 5, ↑YY_minus_XX[i]! ≤ 2 ^ 54

failed_attempts:
have h := YY_minus_XX_post i hi
      have : (↑YY_minus_XX[i]!).val ≤ (↑YY[i]! + ↑XX[i]!) := by
        have := Nat.le_add_right (↑YY_minus_XX[i]!).val (↑YY[i]! + ↑XX[i]!)
        exact le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_self _)) (le_of_eq (by rfl)) |> (fun _ => by
          exact Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_add_left _ _) (Nat.le_add_right _ _))
      exact le_trans this (le_trans (Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_refl _) hsum) (by
        have : (2 : Nat) ^ 55 ≤ (2 : Nat) ^ 54 := by decide
        exact this))
    exact this

have := (sub_bounds YY XX) i hi
      simpa using this
    have : (↑YY_minus_XX[i]!) ≤ 2 ^ 54 := by
      calc
        (↑YY_minus_XX[i]!) ≤ (↑YY[i]!) + (↑XX[i]!) := hsub
        _ ≤ 2 ^ 52 + 2 ^ 52 := by gcongr
        _ = 2 ^ 53 := by ring_nf
        _ ≤ 2 ^ 54 := by
          have : (2 : Nat) ^ 53 ≤ 2 ^ 54 := by
            simpa [pow_succ] using Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left (by decide : (0:Nat) < 2) (a := 2 ^ 53) (b := 2)
          simpa using this
    simpa using this

simpa [sub] using (YY_minus_XX_post i hi)
    have hsub : (2 ^ 54 - (↑XX[i]!).val) ≤ 2 ^ 54 := by
      exact Nat.sub_le _ _
    have : (↑YY_minus_XX[i]!).val ≤ (↑YY[i]!).val + 2 ^ 54 := by
      simpa [hrepr] using Nat.add_le_add_left hsub (↑YY[i]!).val
    have : (↑YY_minus_XX[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 54 + 2 ^ 54 := by
      have := Nat.le_trans this (Nat.add_le_add_right hYY (2 ^ 54))
      simpa [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using this
    exact le_trans this (by
      have : (2 ^ 54 + 2 ^ 54 : Nat) ≤ 2 ^ 54 := by
        simpa using (Nat.le_of_lt (by
          have : (2 ^ 54 + 2 ^ 54 : Nat) < 2 ^ 55 := by
            simpa [pow_succ] using (Nat.add_lt_add_left (Nat.lt_pow_self (by decide) 54) (2 ^ 54))
          exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (by
            have : (2 ^ 55 : Nat) = 2 ^ 54 * 2 := by
              simp [pow_succ]
            simp [this]))
      exact this)

have : (YY_minus_XX[i]!).val ≤ (YY[i]!).val + (XX[i]!).val := by
      have := congrArg (fun (z : UInt64) => (z : Nat)) hpost
      simpa using this.le
    have : (YY_minus_XX[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 54 := by
      calc
        (YY_minus_XX[i]!).val ≤ (YY[i]!).val + (XX[i]!).val := this
        _ ≤ 2 ^ 53 + 2 ^ 53 := Nat.add_le_add hYY hXX
        _ = 2 ^ 54 := by
          norm_num [pow_succ]
    exact this

-- use the postcondition expressing limbwise subtraction bounds
      -- YY_minus_XX[i] = YY[i] - XX[i] + 2^54, hence ≤ 2^54
      nlinarith
    simpa using this

exact le_add_of_nonneg_right (Nat.zero_le _)
    have : (↑YY_minus_XX[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 54 := by
      calc
        (↑YY_minus_XX[i]!).val ≤ (↑YY[i]!).val + (↑XX[i]!).val := hsub
        _ ≤ 2 ^ 53 + 2 ^ 53 := add_le_add hYY hXX
        _ = 2 ^ 54 := by
          norm_num
    simpa using this

intro i hi
    have hy : (q.Y[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 52 := h_qY_bounds i hi
    have hx : (q.X[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 52 := h_qX_bounds i hi
    have hYY : (YY[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 53 := by
      have := (FieldElement51.square_bounds (fe := q.Y) h_qY_bounds) i hi
      simpa using this
    have hXX : (XX[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 53 := by
      have := (FieldElement51.square_bounds (fe := q.X) h_qX_bounds) i hi
      simpa using this
    have hsub : (YY_minus_XX[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 54 := by
      have := (FieldElement51.sub_bounds (a := YY) (b := XX)
        (by intro j hj; simpa using (hYY j hj))
        (by intro j hj; simpa using (hXX j hj))) i hi
      simpa using this
    simpa using hsub

simp [u64.field.FieldElement51.sub]
    have : (YY_minus_XX[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 54 := by
      have hsum : (YY[i]!).val + (XX[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 54 := by
        nlinarith [hYY, hXX]
      exact le_trans this hsum
    simpa using this

intro i hi
    have hy : (q.Y[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 52 := h_qY_bounds i hi
    have hx : (q.X[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 52 := h_qX_bounds i hi
    have hYY : (YY[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 53 := by
      have := (h_qY_bounds i hi)
      scalar_tac
    have hXX : (XX[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 53 := by
      have := (h_qX_bounds i hi)
      scalar_tac
    scalar_tac
